mapper.sql: id, merchant_id, name, description, images, price, buy_amount, send_amount, stock, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM coupon WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM coupon WHERE status = 1 AND stock > 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.merchant_id, c.name, c.description, c.images, c.price, c.buy_amount, c.send_amount, c.stock, c.status, m.name AS merchantName FROM coupon c INNER JOIN merchant m ON c.merchant_id = m.id WHERE c.status = 1 AND c.stock > 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon (merchant_id, name, description, images, price, buy_amount, send_amount, stock, status) VALUES (#{merchantId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{images}, #{price}, #{buyAmount}, #{sendAmount}, #{stock}, #{status})
